title: Skill Testing, Safety, Versioning, and Maintenance · Protocol Recall
summary: Build a regression suite for a skill and its helper scripts. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a skill test and release harness after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Test workflow outcomes under normal, boundary, and failure prompts.
Unit-test helper scripts and verify safe behavior in temporary fixtures.
Review skill scripts, dependencies, file scope, and requested permissions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Local MCP protocol and tool-contract portfolio."""

# Add typed, bounded protocol increments below.

lines.label: assumption

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Use missed triggers, repeated corrections, and failures to improve the skill.
